title: Gorilla Tape White 27m
description: From the manufacturer Gorilla Tape White 27m Gorilla Tape is extra strong, double-thick and incredibly tough. Whether you need to stick rough, smooth or uneven surfaces, this is the duct tape with extra grip. Indoors and out, you can use Gorilla Tape where you want. The rugged all-weather shell withstands the elements, and the double-thick adhesive remains strong, whatever it faces. Designed to be tearable, developed to be durable, Gorilla Tape stands up to the test. Product Features Grips Rough & Uneven Surfaces Double thick adhesive. Can be used on rough, uneven surfaces for extra grip. Weather Resistant Tough, weather-resistant shell. Helps create a barrier that can withstand hard elements. Extra Thick & Strong Strong, reinforced backing. The tight weave reinforces, but Gorilla Tape can still be ripped neatly by hand. Gorilla Contact Adhesive Gorilla Epoxy Gorilla Grab Adhesive Gorilla Glue 500ml Gorilla Wood Glue 532ml Gorilla Tape Silver 11m Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 11,836 4.5 out of 5 stars 16,312 4.4 out of 5 stars 11,685 4.6 out of 5 stars 534 4.6 out of 5 stars 39,594 4.7 out of 5 stars 1,881 Price £6.98 £ 6 . 98 £6.50 £ 6 . 50 £6.23 £ 6 . 23 £19.46 £ 19 . 46 £8.95 £ 8 . 95 £7.48 £ 7 . 48 Other Products from Gorilla The flexible, all-round glue that's waterproof. The crystal clear, gap filling, two-part adhesive. The all-purpose way to bond. The incredibly strong adhesive you can trust for your toughest jobs. The hard-working, water resistant wood glue. Grips smooth, rough and uneven surfaces.
